trigger: R12 config sync from opc2_uname (remote push) — proxy auto-compact removal + MODEL_INPUT_TOKEN_SAFETY/contextWindow/autoCompactWindow adjustments

R5_changes.description: R12 config sync from opc2_uname — 3 critical changes

changes.name: proxy auto-compact removed
changes.before: proxy auto-compacts messages when est_tokens > safety, INPUT-REJECT-UNCOMPACTABLE fallback -> 429
changes.after: proxy no longer truncates/compacts. INPUT-WARN only logs. ModelScope overflow -> invalid_request_error -> CC stops
changes.why: proxy-level truncation causes catastrophic context loss. Three compression mechanisms stacked unpredictably. CC built-in auto-compact is the only mechanism now.

changes.name: MODEL_INPUT_TOKEN_SAFETY 120K->170K
changes.why: ModelScope limit=202745. With safety=120K, only 90K usable (autoCompactWindow=90K) = 44% capacity. With safety=170K, 150K usable = 74% capacity utilization
changes.expected_impact: more usable context before CC auto-compact triggers, fewer premature compactions

changes.name: contextWindow/autoCompactWindow 120K/90K->170K/150K
changes.why: Matches MODEL_INPUT_TOKEN_SAFETY=170K. CC uses contextWindow for internal tracking and autoCompactWindow for trigger threshold
changes.expected_impact: CC can use 150K tokens before compacting = 74% of ModelScope capacity (vs 44% before)

529_error_analysis.fix: R12 removes proxy auto-compact entirely — these errors eliminated

429_error_analysis.note: quota exhaustion cannot be fixed by config changes
